zh-TW.title: 手機 BLE 遙控無人車
zh-TW.summary: 從手機操作、觸控模型與資料封包開始，逐步完成 BLE 連線與安全上線。
zh-TW.description: 這門課帶領學生把手機操作、控制資料、BLE 連線和安全部署串成一條完整主線。

en.title: Mobile BLE Remote Control for an Autonomous Car
en.summary: From mobile interaction and payload design to BLE connection and secure rollout.
en.description: This course guides students from touch-based control models to Web BLE connectivity and safe deployment.
